npcPresets.name: Merchant
npcPresets.personality: Warm, practical, and alert for deals.
npcPresets.publicDescription: A traveling merchant watches the party with a practiced smile.
npcPresets.dialoguePrompt: Ask about prices, gossip, or local rumors.
npcPresets.questHooks: Needs guards, delivery help, or a stolen crate recovered.

npcPresets.name: Guard
npcPresets.publicDescription: A town guard keeps a hand near their weapon.
npcPresets.dialoguePrompt: Ask about patrol routes, recent trouble, or local law.
npcPresets.questHooks: Needs help chasing raiders or securing a dangerous road.

npcPresets.name: Innkeeper
npcPresets.personality: Friendly, curious, and quick with names.
npcPresets.publicDescription: An innkeeper polishes mugs while watching the common room.
npcPresets.dialoguePrompt: Ask about guests, rumors, or spare rooms.
npcPresets.questHooks: Has heard rumors of hidden treasure or missing travelers.

npcPresets.name: Priest
npcPresets.publicDescription: A priest tends candles and speaks in a calming tone.
npcPresets.dialoguePrompt: Ask about blessings, burial rites, or local omens.
npcPresets.questHooks: Needs relics recovered or restless dead laid to rest.

npcPresets.name: Noble
npcPresets.publicDescription: A noble studies the room with a cool, measured gaze.
npcPresets.dialoguePrompt: Ask about politics, patronage, or family feuds.
npcPresets.questHooks: Needs discreet help solving a scandal or protecting an heir.

npcPresets.name: Criminal
npcPresets.publicDescription: A hooded fixer lingers where the light is weakest.
npcPresets.dialoguePrompt: Ask about contraband, rumors, or hidden entrances.
npcPresets.questHooks: Knows about smuggling routes, stolen goods, or ambush plans.

npcPresets.name: Scholar
npcPresets.personality: Distracted, brilliant, and eager to explain.
npcPresets.publicDescription: A scholar clutches notes covered in urgent markings.
npcPresets.dialoguePrompt: Ask about ruins, symbols, or old records.
npcPresets.questHooks: Needs escorts to ruins or rare tomes retrieved.

npcPresets.name: Hunter
npcPresets.personality: Quiet, observant, and weathered by the wilds.
npcPresets.publicDescription: A hunter watches the treeline for the slightest movement.
npcPresets.dialoguePrompt: Ask about tracks, beasts, or hidden trails.
npcPresets.questHooks: Needs help following predators or scouting a dangerous forest.
